label: Survey Target Type (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A category that best matches the nature of a scope in an eco:SurveyTarget.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the ecoiri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Survey Target Value (IRI)
rdfs_comment: A value to include or exclude in a scope categorized by eco:surveyTargetType.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the ecoiri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.

label: Survey Target Unit (IRI)
rdfs_comment: Unit associated with a value in eco:surveyTargetValue.
dcterms_description: Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. Terms in the ecoiri: namespace are intended to be used in RDF with non-literal objects.
